data.description:
## What

Add missing documentation to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and onboarding/SKILL.md:
1. Add `ci.dso_plugin_version` config key entry (after ci.integration_workflow section, before commands.test section — line ~209)
2. Add auto-detect runner mode documentation (marker file `plugins/dso/.dso-source-of-truth`, `$DSO_ASSETS_DIR` env var contract, local-checkout vs fetched-assets behavior)
3. Verify DSO_LLM_TIER is absent from both files (grep returns zero matches — already confirmed clean)
4. Update `.github/required-checks.txt` if any CI job was renamed (verify via validate-required-checks.sh)
5. Write structural test verifying DSO_LLM_TIER no longer appears in the documented files

## Files to Modify

- `plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` (insert after line ~209, after ci.integration_workflow section)
- `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md` (add ci.dso_plugin_version and auto-detect mode docs)
- `tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh` OR a new test file: structural test for DSO_LLM_TIER absence
- `.github/required-checks.txt` (check only — update if CI job names changed)

## Acceptance Criteria

- CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents ci.dso_plugin_version key with description, accepted values, default, used-by
- CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents auto-detect runner mode: marker file plugins/dso/.dso-source-of-truth, DSO_ASSETS_DIR env var contract, local-checkout vs fetched-assets behavior
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md contains same additions
- grep for DSO_LLM_TIER in both files returns zero matches
- A test asserts DSO_LLM_TIER is absent from CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and onboarding/SKILL.md
- validate-required-checks.sh passes (no renamed CI jobs break required checks)

## Context on ci.dso_plugin_version

This config key is Tier 2 of the 3-tier version resolution chain for CI LLM review:
- Tier 1: pinned in .github/workflows/ci.yml (DSO_PLUGIN_VERSION env var)
- Tier 2: ci.dso_plugin_version in dso-config.conf (project-level override)
- Tier 3: 'dso-dev' (latest HEAD — fallback)

The key allows the project to override the pinned CI version without editing the workflow file.

## Context on auto-detect runner mode

ci-llm-review-runner.sh auto-detects its execution context:
- Local DSO checkout: presence of marker file at $(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../.dso-source-of-truth → uses BASH_SOURCE-relative _PLUGIN_ROOT
- Host-project CI with fetched assets: marker absent → requires DSO_ASSETS_DIR env var to be set; prints error to stderr and exits 1 if absent
data.title: Add ci.dso_plugin_version and auto-detect runner mode docs to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and onboarding SKILL.md
